name: deepchem
tagline: Guides Claude Code through DeepChem: loading, featurizing, training, and evaluating molecular ML models for drug discovery and materials sci
verdict: Clean, purely technical library-usage skill with no security red flags. Only issue: SKILL.md runs ~602 lines, over the ~500-line budget, and Bash/Write/Edit tool access is broad but consistent with its stated purpose (installing packages, running training scripts).

highlights.summary: No explicit statement of what the skill should hand back to the user (e.g., expected files, printed metrics format) — output is implied by code examples only, not stated as a contract.
File is 602 lines, exceeding the ~500-line budget by roughly 20%, though content is organized and not padded.
